_comment: IMPORTANT — these are PLACEHOLDER testimonials. Do NOT publish fake testimonials on a live site: it misleads visitors and can breach advertising rules. Replace every entry below with a REAL quote (with permission) before launch, or remove the testimonials section entirely until you have real ones. Same goes for the 'stats' numbers — set them to true values or remove them.

testimonials.quote: PLACEHOLDER — replace with a real, permission-given student quote. Describe the specific result they got (e.g. an admission or job offer).
testimonials.name: Student Name

testimonials.quote: PLACEHOLDER — a second real testimonial goes here. Keep it concrete and honest. One or two sentences is enough.
testimonials.name: Student Name

testimonials.quote: PLACEHOLDER — a third real testimonial goes here. Specific beats generic — mention what changed for them.
testimonials.name: Student Name
